description: Investment in PPE and intangible assets reduced versus 2024/25 while maintaining energy efficiency and renewable energy transition projects.

theme: Sugar segment investment under restructuring pressure
description: Sugar segment capex remained material while operating result was negative; restructuring and impairments signal pressure.
Sugar segment result from restructuring and special items was strongly negative, connected to impairment and closure measures.
Polish plants shift from coal to gas; Könnern biomass/biogas energy system planned; emphasizes decarbonisation of operations.

theme: Brazilian plant disposal and debt control
description: Andrade plant sale and working-capital discipline used to stabilize net debt under lower sugar-price conditions.

ABF Sugar reported £315m gross investment in 2025 despite an adjusted operating loss, showing that capital allocation continued even while European sugar prices and restructuring weighed on profitability.

ABF recognised impairment charges and restructuring costs relating to Vivergo and Azucarera; the business impact is a strategic warning about exposure to low European sugar prices and uncertain bioethanol regulation.

The Eswatini debottlenecking programme is expected to increase total sugar production by 47,000 tonnes over five years, illustrating that ABF Sugar is simultaneously restructuring Europe and investing in African growth.
